vision: A mobile app for individuals to manage daily tasks efficiently.

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to create new tasks with essential details

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to create a task with a title, so that I can capture what I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button Then I see a form to enter task details
Given I am on the add task form When I enter a title and save Then the task appears in my task list

stories.title: Add due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to add a due date to my task, so that I know when it needs to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a task When I tap the due date field Then I see a date picker
Given I have selected a due date When I save the task Then the due date is displayed with the task

epics.name: Task Management
epics.description: Allow users to update and remove tasks

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task When I tap the complete checkbox Then the task is marked as complete
Given a task is marked complete When I view the task list Then the task shows a completed visual state

stories.title: Delete a task
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove tasks I no longer need
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task When I swipe or tap delete Then I am asked to confirm deletion
Given I confirm deletion When the action completes Then the task is removed from my list

epics.name: Task Viewing
epics.description: Display tasks to users in an organized manner

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I open the app Then I see all my tasks in a list
Given I am viewing the task list When tasks exist Then each task displays its title and due date

stories.title: View empty state message
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to see a helpful message when I have no tasks, so that I know how to get started
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no tasks When I view the task list Then I see a friendly empty state message
Given I see the empty state When I look for guidance Then there is a prompt to create my first task

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Enable users to filter and find specific tasks

stories.title: Filter tasks by incomplete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to filter to see only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are shown
Given I am viewing filtered incomplete tasks When a task is marked complete Then it is removed from the current view

stories.title: Filter tasks by complete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to filter to see only completed tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the complete filter Then only completed tasks are shown
Given I am viewing filtered complete tasks When I clear the filter Then all tasks are displayed
